response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable and versatile Staff Software Engineer with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, but he fundamentally lacks the executive leadership experience required for a CTO role. There is no evidence of scaling engineering organizations, managing managers, or communicating with a board, and his agentic AI experience appears too recent and tooling-focused to meet the deep architectural requirements of this AI-native fintech position.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on software engineering experience, including designing high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent practical experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Demonstrated polyglot engineering capabilities (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C++) and strong focus on software craftsmanship and testing.
concerns: Zero evidence of executive engineering leadership, such as scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people, managing offshore partners, or board-level communication.
Lacks deep production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes commercial or financial environments.
Missing core domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital allocation, real-time credit risk, and compliance infrastructure.
